---
title: "\'Servian Proverbs\'"
---

## \'Servian Proverbs\'

**Author:** Whitley Stokes
**Imprint:** <i>Fraser\'s Magazine</i> 51 (May 1855) 517-526

### Notes

The article discusses the work of the Serbian linguist Vuk Stefanovic Karadzic (1787-1864).

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
